title: Result - Croatia
content:
Welcome to Croatia, a stunning horseshoe-shaped country with plains, mountains and a sunny coastline featuring over a thousand islands.
Nearly 10% of Croatia is protected through nature parks, national parks and reserves. Explore ancient cobbled streets, UNESCO World Heritage Sites and turquoise Adriatic waters, or hike, cycle and raft in its parks. Croatian cuisine offers a unique mix of Mediterranean seafood and Central European dishes like schnitzel and strudel, making it a diverse culinary destination.

## Unique food tradition
Crni Rižot (black risotto): a seafood dish infused with squid ink.
The most important branch of the Croatian economy is tourism, with more than 16 million foreign guests annually, contributing almost 20% to the GDP.

### Local legend or myth
Vila: Croatian fairies are young, beautiful women with animal legs hidden beneath white dresses. According to legend, they die of sadness if a hair is pulled from their head.

### Language of the Land
The Croatian language is one of the few that has 3 grammatical genders: masculine, feminine and neuter.
islands, isles and inlets make up Croatia's beautiful coastline.
